title: streptanthus insignis subsp. lyonii
intro: Streptanthus insignis subsp. lyonii, also known as Lyon's jewelflower, is a rare and endangered plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its striking purple and yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been employed to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Lyon's jewelflower are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
